race.comment: ROB THE BANK (7) has had three runs for the new yard and is frustratingly close to a win. Narrowly beaten all three, the latest over the border when finishing runner-up. Strong rider Jason Holder takes over and looks tough to stop this line-up. PRANCETHRULIFE (6) got home hard and just missed latest behind All Shot. Similar weight with the claim and has a tricky draw to overcome but close to a win and will be winding up late. VEXATIOUS CHOICE (4) returned off a long break with a close-up fourth. Strips fitter and is one of the leading chances. HARRINO (1) is mixing form but can give a sight despite the wide draw.
